notes: Menu-service recovery evidence must prove the approved operator recovery drill restores active-role-only protected ingress without reopening legacy bearer-role fallback.
Post-recovery readiness stays fail-closed until the shared recovery manifest records successful menu protected-ingress verification against the restored Zitadel state.
Order-service recovery evidence must prove that the approved operator recovery drill restores active-role-only order placement and staff-read surfaces without reopening legacy bearer fallback.
Post-recovery readiness stays fail-closed until the shared recovery manifest records both restored Zitadel state and order-service protected-ingress verification.
Analytics-service recovery evidence must prove that the approved operator recovery drill restores owner REST and manager live WebSocket readiness under the final active-role-only contract.
Post-recovery readiness stays fail-closed until the shared recovery manifest records both restored Zitadel state and analytics active-role authorization checks.
Notification-service recovery evidence must prove that the approved operator recovery drill restores the active-role-only WebSocket handshake and heartbeat revalidation path.
Post-recovery readiness stays fail-closed until the shared recovery manifest records restored Zitadel state and live-session revocation behavior.
